title: HR Intern
description:
Instawork is on a mission to create meaningful economic opportunities for skilled hourly professionals in communities around the globe. Our AI-powered labor marketplace helps local businesses scale, and enables global technology companies to push the frontiers of robotics and AI. Backed by world-class investors like Benchmark, Spark Capital, Craft Ventures, Greylock, Y Combinator, and others, we’re looking for exceptional talent to reimagine the way the world works.

Location: Kormangala, Bangalore

Working Days: 6 Days a Week

Experience: Fresher (0–1 year)

Duration: 3 months

About the Role:

We are looking for a proactive and energetic HR Intern to support our day-to-day recruitment activities. This role is perfect for someone who wants to kick-start their career in HR, enjoys interacting with people, and thrives in a fast-paced startup environment.

Key Responsibilities:


Support end-to-end hiring for fresher and entry-level roles
Source, screen, and call candidates for various positions
Schedule and coordinate interviews with hiring panels
Maintain candidate trackers and ensure timely follow-ups
Assist in releasing offer letters and completing onboarding documentation
Ensure strong communication and coordination between candidates and internal stakeholders
Contribute to improving hiring processes and candidate experience



Requirements:


Good written and verbal communication skills
Strong organizational and follow-up abilities
Proactive attitude and willingness to learn
Comfortable working in a dynamic startup environment
Ability to manage multiple tasks at once
Available to work 6 days a week



Additional information:


Free Lunch + Snacks Daily
Cool workspace and fun team environment
Exclusive project goodies



Our Values


Empathy, Trust & Candor We put ourselves in the shoes of our colleagues and customers and don’t shy away from uncomfortable conversations, instead building trust through honest and direct feedback.
Bias for Action We practice high-velocity decision-making, clear-eyed that we often operate with incomplete information. Growing quickly means it’s OK to be wrong, so long as we learn from our mistakes and course correct!
Always Be Learning We’re a curious bunch, and with AI transforming our workplace we encourage everyone to learn from each other, compounding our knowledge and experience to help us change an entire industry.
Act Like an Owner We work long, hard, and smart, building products that delight our users and drive growth. Your ability to impact Instawork is limited only by your courage and conviction, not your job description.



About Instawork

Founded in 2015, Instawork is the nation’s leading online labor marketplace for food services, hospitality, light industry, and logistics, connecting more than 7M skilled workers with local restaurants, hotels, warehouses, stadiums, and more. Our AI-powered platform serves thousands of businesses across more than 50 major markets in the United States and Canada. We're not just helping fill shifts, we're supporting local economies—and we're just getting started!

Instawork has been featured by CBS News, The Wall Street Journal, The Washington Post, and the Associated Press. Forbes included us on their Next Billion Dollar Startups list; RetailTech Breakthrough named us Workforce Hiring Solution of the Year for 2025; and Inc. 5000 recognized us as one of the country's top 10% fastest-growing companies two years in a row. But what matters most is our impact. We're solving real problems for real people, and we’re doing it at scale.

Join our team to help us build something that matters! We’re looking for superstars who want to help us shape the future of work. With hubs in San Francisco, Bangalore, and Chicago, city offices in New York, Phoenix, and Singapore, we're back to working together in-person five days a week because we believe the best ideas happen when great people collaborate face-to-face. We also value diverse perspectives and encourage applications from candidates of all backgrounds.

Ready to make an impact? Learn more at www.instawork.com/about.

Personnel Privacy Policy
Show more

title: Chartered Accountant (Fresher)
description:
We are looking for dynamic CA Freshers to join Ola’s Finance team across multiple verticals such as FP&A, Controllership, Business Finance, and Taxation. The role offers exposure to end-to-end finance operations, business partnering, financial management, and cross-functional collaboration in a fast-paced environment.




Key Responsibilities:

Support budgeting, forecasting, and monthly financial performance analysis.
Conduct variance analysis and assist in preparing management reporting decks.
Perform accounting activities including reconciliations, journal entries, and month-end close tasks.
Assist in audit preparation, documentation, and compliance activities.
Partner with business teams to analyse costs, revenue, profitability, and operational efficiencies.
Support financial modelling, scenario planning, and KPI tracking.
Assist in treasury operations such as cash flow management, banking coordination, and investment documentation.
Conduct process reviews, identify gaps, and support internal audit activities.
Prepare data packs, dashboards, and analysis for leadership decision-making.
Work with cross-functional teams to support strategic and operational finance initiatives.




Key Requirements:

Chartered Accountant (CA) – recently qualified
Strong understanding of financial statements, accounting concepts, and Ind-AS.
Proficiency in MIS reporting, Excel (advanced functions), and large dataset analysis.
Working knowledge of ERP systems and finance tools preferred.
Good communication and stakeholder management skills.
High attention to detail with strong problem-solving ability.
Ability to adapt to a fast-paced environment and take ownership of tasks.

title: Software Engineer 1
description:
Role: Software Engineer 1

Location: Bangalore (5 days WFO)

Experience: 0-2 Years (Entry Level)

Gender Diversity candidates only (Must)

Requirements

We are looking for a motivated and curious Software Engineer 1 to join our engineering team. This is a foundational role designed for a fresher who is eager to apply their academic knowledge to real-world problems, build scalable applications, and grow alongside a team of experienced developers.

Key Responsibilities

As a member of our engineering cohort, you will:


Develop & Maintain: Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and maintain high-quality software applications
Write Quality Code: Produce clean, efficient, and maintainable code while adhering to industry best practices and coding standards
Optimize Performance: Proactively troubleshoot and debug applications to ensure peak performance and a seamless user experience
Document: Assist in creating comprehensive technical documentation and user guides to support product scalability
Evolve: Engage in continuous learning, staying ahead of the curve with emerging technologies and modern development methodologies


What We're Looking For


Experience: 0-2 years of hands-on experience in software development (valuable internships or significant academic projects are highly encouraged)
Core Fundamentals: A rock-solid understanding of software engineering fundamentals, Data Structures, and Algorithms (DSA)
Technical Stack: Proficiency in at least one major programming language: Go, Java, or Python
Web Basics: Foundational knowledge of front-end technologies, specifically React and Node.js
Mindset: An enthusiastic problem-solver who enjoys tackling complex challenges and thrives in a fast-paced environment
Education: BE/BTech degree, preferably from Tier 1 or Tier 2 institutions
Cloud Awareness: Familiarity with cloud ecosystems like AWS or GCP is a significant plus
Tooling: Hands-on experience with version control systems, specifically Git

title: AI Software Developer Intern
description:
AI Software Developer

Company: Way2Agribusiness India Pvt. Ltd.

Location: Yeshwanthpur, Bengaluru (On-site)

Experience: Interns / 0–2 Years / Relevant Experience

Preferred Candidates: Must have skills in all 3 areas, such as Django, Next.js, FastAPI, and AI/M

Employment Type: Internship with Guaranteed Job on Successful Completion (PPO for deserving candidates)

Remuneration / Stipend: Paid Internship   




About Us:

Way2Agribusiness India Pvt. Ltd. is a leading agribusiness and agritech organization focused on building AI-driven intelligence platforms, advisory services, forecasting systems, and digital agriculture solutions for farmers, FPOs, agripreneurs, and agribusiness enterprises.




We are currently developing our integrated AI ecosystem under Way2AgriIntel, which consists of five core intelligence models that are patented:




• CropIntel – Crop Planning & Yield Forecasting

• AgMachineX – Farm Mechanization Intelligence

• AgriFBI – Market & Price Forecasting System

• AgriClinic – Crop & Soil Diagnostic Intelligence

• NutriTracker – Nutrient & Input Recommendation Engine




Our platform integrates:

• Machine Learning for short-term forecasting & others

• Statistical Modeling for medium-term projections & others

• Deep Learning for long-term predictive intelligence




The backend is built using Python, Django, REST API & FastAPI, with Next.js frontend and advanced analytics integration. We are looking for enthusiastic AI/ML candidates interested in working on real-time agriculture intelligence and predictive systems.




Website to understand work scope:

www.way2agriintel.com

https://www.way2agribusiness.com/online-services/

https://www.way2agribusiness.com/career-opportunities/




Key Responsibilities:

• Develop and implement Machine Learning models for crop, price, and yield forecasting

• Work on statistical modeling and predictive analytics frameworks

• Build and integrate REST APIs using Django & FastAPI

• Support frontend-backend integration with Next.js

• Contribute to AI-based diagnostic and decision-support systems

• Assist in model testing, optimization, and deployment

• Collaborate with agronomy, IT, and digital teams for integrated platform delivery

Who Can Apply:

• Candidates with strong fundamentals in Python programming

• Basic to intermediate knowledge of Machine Learning, Statistical Modeling & Deep Learning

• Familiarity with Django, REST API, FastAPI & Next.js

• Fresher’s passionate about AI + Agriculture domain

• Graduates / Postgraduates (Computer Science, AI/ML, Data Science, Engineering preferred)




(Experienced candidates may be offered direct role with higher package based on performance and expertise.)




What You Gain:

• Real-time exposure to Agri-AI platform development

• Work exposure in the impactful and patented project

• Hands-on experience in multi-model forecasting systems

• Cross-functional collaboration with agritech and agronomy experts

• Opportunity to become part of the founding AI vertical

• Long-term growth in an emerging Agri Intelligence ecosystem




Contact:

Dr. Prasanna D

Way2Agribusiness India Pvt. Ltd.

Mob: 9449004956

Email: dr.prasannad@way2agribusiness.com




Interested candidates can reply with their resumes, GitHub profiles, and availability.

title: Gradute / Diploma Engineers for Internship from EEE and ECE
description:
Company Description

Sipani Energy Ltd, part of the renowned Sipani Group, is committed to contributing to a sustainable future through innovative energy-saving solutions. With extensive experience in developing and manufacturing advanced technologies, we work with clients to offer intuitive and efficient lighting and Equipment solutions. The company leverages expertise and pioneering spirit to drive progress in energy conservation, aligned with a vision of global development. At Sipani Energy Ltd, innovation and sustainability are at the forefront of our operations.




Role Description

This is a full-time on-site internship opportunity in Bengaluru for Graduate/Diploma Engineers from EEE (Electrical and Electronics Engineering) and ECE (Electronics and Communication Engineering) disciplines. Interns will engage in hands-on experience working with innovative technologies, assisting in the design, testing, and implementation of energy-efficient solutions. Day-to-day tasks include collaborating with engineering teams, analyzing technical data, performing equipment testing, and contributing to research and development projects aligned with the company’s energy conservation goals.




Qualifications

Strong technical foundation in Electrical and Electronics Engineering (EEE) or Electronics and Communication Engineering (ECE).
Knowledge of electrical circuits, embedded systems, and digital electronics.
Basic understanding of technology and energy-efficient systems is a plus.
Proficiency in technical documentation, data analysis, and problem-solving skills.
Familiarity with engineering design tools, software, or simulation tools is an advantage.
Ability to collaborate effectively in a team environment and learn from senior engineers.
Adaptability to work in a fast-paced and dynamic environment.

title: Associate - SOC
description:
About River

River is an electric vehicle company building multi-utility scooters. At River, we’re building scooters of tomorrow for the ambitious youth of today. Because we believe people only need two things to achieve success: the desire to make it to the top, and the means to get there.

With our flagship product River Indie, SUVofScooters, is designed to help you get things done. Engineered to be a dependable ally on your road to success. We are backed by marquee international investors - these are mobility focused funds backed by Yamaha Motors, Al-Futtaim Automotive Group, Toyota VC and Maniv Mobility.

Key Responsibilities


Monitor both SIEM dashboards and the CrowdStrike Falcon console to detect potential security incidents, distinguishing between normal network noise and genuine threats
Utilize CrowdStrike’s Process Execution Trees to trace the root cause of alerts, analyzing parent/child process relationships (e.g., "Why did Excel spawn PowerShell?") to identify malicious behavior.
Apply CCNA-level knowledge of the OSI Model and TCP/IP to correlate endpoint alerts with network logs, verifying if compromised hosts are communicating with Command & Control (C2) servers
Move beyond simple signature matching by using Indicators of Attack (IOAs) to spot "Living off the Land" attacks (fileless malware) and mapping them to the MITRE ATT&CK framework
Act as the first responder for security alerts, classifying incidents based on severity and following the NIST Incident Response Lifecycle (Detection & Analysis) to escalate verified threats
Assist in cross-referencing CVEs with CrowdStrike Spotlight data and apply CEH knowledge to understand how attackers might exploit unpatched vulnerabilities in the wild
Analyze network packet headers (understanding the TCP 3-Way Handshake and flags) to identify anomalies like SYN floods or port scanning
Document investigation findings clearly in ticketing systems, detailing the "Who, What, When, and How" of the incident for senior analysts


Ideal Candidate


B.E. / B.Tech / M.Tech in Information Technology, Computer Science, or Cybersecurity.
Mandatory : CCNA (Strong Network Foundation) & CompTIA Security+ (Security Core)
Fresher with active CEH (Certified Ethical Hacker) or CrowdStrike Certified Falcon Administrator (CCFA)
Conceptual understanding of EDR (Endpoint Detection & Response) vs. Legacy Antivirus, and the benefits of cloud-native, lightweight agents
Deep understanding of Stateful vs. Stateless Firewalls, DMZ concepts, and packet filtering logic
Strong familiarity with the Cyber Kill Chain, SQL Injection, XSS, and Phishing vectors
Ability to explain the difference between IOCs (hashes, IPs) and IOAs (behaviors), and how to use Real Time Response (RTR) concepts
Basic understanding of Symmetric/Asymmetric encryption, Hashing (SHA/MD5), and PKI
Willingness to work in rotational 24/7 shifts (including nights, weekends, and holidays) to support a continuous monitoring Security Operations Center environment
Strong analytical thinking, ability to "follow the breadcrumbs" during an investigation, and concise communication skills for incident reporting

description:

Maintain standards as per Company requirements.
Ensure effective threat assessment and response capability.

title: Business Development Associate (Pre Sales) | Fresher | Immediate Joiner
description:
Codingal (www.codingal.com) is the global leader in online AI & coding education for kids and teens. We offer live, interactive classes led by expert Computer Science instructors, empowering students to build apps, games, websites, and AI-powered projects.




Our mission is to help kids fall in love with coding and prepare them to become future-ready creators, entrepreneurs, engineers, and scientists. With a curriculum accredited by STEM.org and aligned with the K-12 Computer Science Framework, we offer personalized learning through 1:1 and small-group classes.

As AI reshapes the world, Codingal integrates real-world AI tools like ChatGPT, machine learning, and data science into the learning journey, helping kids not just use AI but build with it.

Trusted by over 1 million students worldwide and backed by Y Combinator, Rebright Partners, and top angels, Codingal is rated 4.9/5 by students and has an NPS of 86, making it the most loved platform for coding and AI education.




We are seeking a dynamic BDA (Pre Sales) to join the vibrant team at Codingal. The role involves supporting the sales team by understanding client needs, preparing tailored presentations, demonstrating product capabilities, and assisting in closing deals. If you have a knack for communication and problem-solving, join us in revolutionizing K-12 education!




Responsibilities:

Leverage Tele-calling to generate leads and conversions.
Work on Lead Squared CRM and tele calling tools like 3CX for day-to-day tasks.
Initiate outbound calls to existing users of Codingal for lead generation for trial booking.
Conducted outbound calls to qualify leads, as well as followed up with reminder calls.
Conduct a CNA (customer need assessment) for every lead.




Requirements:

Prior experience in Pre-Sales or Tele calling is preferred 0 to 6 months
Clear, concise, and effective written and oral communication skills.
Empathy towards customers and understanding their needs.
The candidate should be comfortable working on weekends with week off on a weekday
Learning mindset and the right attitude to adapt in a fast-paced, performance-driven environment.




Education:

• Bachelor's Degree




Perks:




Free Lunch and Dinner
Medical Insurance
PF Contribution




What we offer:

3.6 LPA fixed + 4 LPA Variables
A collaborative, mission-driven team culture
Career growth opportunities




Location: HSR Layout, Bangalore, India




You get to work with a young & smart team, including directly with the founders, who are on a mission to inspire school kids to fall in love with coding. Join us on the journey to provide coding education to every K-12 student and prepare them for the future.

Apply now!

title: Financial Analyst, GFS FP&A
description:
Description

About the Organization: Amazon is a US-based multinational electronic commerce company headquartered in Seattle, Washington. Amazon.com started as an online bookstore, but soon diversified into many other categories, with a vision to be earth's most customer-centric company & to build a place where people can come to find and discover anything they might want to buy online.

About the role: Amazon's Global Finance Solutions (GFS) team is a fast-paced, team-focused, dynamic environment and delivering great experiences for our customers is top priority. GFS is seeking a Financial Analyst for AWS Services Finance team. The candidate would be responsible for financial close and performing related reporting, accruals etc. Additionally, the role would support monthly P&L analysis, perform financial reporting and forecasts, use financial systems and advanced MS Excel functions to work with large data sets, and perform headcount reporting, planning and forecasting. Additional responsibilities would include establishing, measuring and monitoring weekly KPI metric discussions for new and/or existing business initiatives and operational performance and assisting in measuring and reporting progress on key goals for the business team in a timely and accurate manner. The candidate would also perform ad-hoc business analyses and financial modeling, provide inputs for monthly and quarterly business reviews in a timely manner, facilitate business reviews with data analysis, identify and implement solutions to resolve, improve, automate, standardize, or simplify finance processes, and identify incomplete or inaccurate data, root cause of data issues, escalate discrepancies, fix data where possible or partner to deliver a solution.

Basic Qualifications


Experience using data to influence business decisions
CA fresher / 1+ years of experience in FP&A, closing of Books of accounts and reporting & analytics


Preferred Qualifications


Experience in managing, evaluating, analyzing data quickly and creating meaningful business reporting.
Good financial acumen with problem-solving and decision-making skills.
Manage competing priorities and meet deadlines.
Good interpersonal skills — including written and oral communication skills.
Advanced proficiency in Excel.
Retail industry experience.
Experience in VBA, COGNOS and SQL is a plus.


Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how-we-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.


Company - ADCI - Karnataka

title: Senior Analyst - Assurance - National - ASU - FAAS - Financial&AccountingAdv - Bangalore
description:
Requisition Id: 1693496

As a global leader in assurance, tax, transaction and advisory services, we hire and develop the most passionate people in their field to help build a better working world. This starts with a culture that believes in giving you the training, opportunities and creative freedom. At EY, we don't just focus on who you are now, but who you can become. We believe that it’s your career and ‘It’s yours to build’ which means potential here is limitless and we'll provide you with motivating and fulfilling experiences throughout your career to help you on the path to becoming your best professional self.

The opportunity : Senior Analyst-National-Assurance-ASU - FAAS - Financial&AccountingAdv - Bangalore

National :

National comprises of sector agnostic teams working across industries for a well rounded experience.

ASU - FAAS - Financial&AccountingAdv :

Assurance’s purpose is to inspire confidence and trust to enable a complex world to work. We do so by protecting and serving the public interest, promoting transparency, supporting investor confidence and economic growth and nurturing talent to provide future business leaders . We help clients by :


Ensuring their accounts comply with the requisite audit standards
Providing a robust and clear perspective to audit committees and
Providing critical information for stakeholders.


Our Service Offerings include External Audit, Financial Accounting Advisory Services (FAAS) , IFRS & US GAAP conversion , IPO and other public offering, Corporate Treasury - IFRS 9 accounting & implementation support etc

Your Key Responsibilities

Technical Excellence


We are looking for a GenAI / Agentic AI Engineer to build and deploy LLM-powered applications such as RAG assistants, multi-agent workflows, anomaly/outlier detection accelerators, and conversational analytics. The role requires strong Python engineering, experience with LLM orchestration frameworks, and the ability to ship cloud-ready, secure, production-grade solutions. Key Responsibilities
Build LLM/GenAI applications (chat assistants, copilots, Q&A systems) using RAG over structured/unstructured enterprise data.
Develop agentic/multi-agent workflows for planning, validation, and orchestration (tool use, task decomposition, reviewer agents, etc).
Implement backend services and APIs (e.g., FastAPI/Node/Express) and integrate LLM APIs (OpenAI/Gemini/Azure OpenAI).
Design ingestion pipelines: document upload ? chunking ? embeddings ? indexing (vector DB / semantic search) ? retrieval + generation.
Add evaluation & guardrails: prompt discipline, relevance checks, grounded responses, monitoring, and feedback loops to reduce hallucinations.
Package and deploy solutions using Docker and cloud services (AWS/Azure/GCP/Vertex AI), with basic CI/CD practices where possible.
(Nice to have) Work on anomaly/outlier detection use cases in finance / risk / fraud / audit analytics and explainability Required Skills (Must-Have)
Python for AI application development and API services.
Hands-on with RAG and at least one orchestration framework such as LangChain / LangGraph (or equivalent).
Experience integrating LLM providers: OpenAI / Gemini / Azure OpenAI (prompting, tool use, structured outputs).
Backend/API development: FastAPI or Node.js/Express (REST APIs, auth basics).
Solid fundamentals: data structures, problem-solving, clean coding and version control (Git).


Skills And Attributes

To qualify for the role you must have

Qualification


Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science
Bachelor of Computer Applications
Certification in Data Analytics


Experience


Gen AI Fresher (0-1)


What We Look For

People with the ability to work in a collaborative manner to provide services across multiple client departments while following the commercial and legal requirements. You will need a practical approach to solving issues and complex problems with the ability to deliver insightful and practical solutions. We look for people who are agile, curious, mindful, and able to sustain positive energy, while being adaptable and creative in their approach.

What We Offer

Fuelled by the brilliance of our people, EY has emerged as the strongest brand and the most attractive employer in our field, with market-leading growth over competitors. Our people work side-by-side with market-leading entrepreneurs, game-changers, disruptors, and visionaries. As an organization, we are investing more time, technology, and money than ever before in skills and learning for our people. At EY, you will have a personalized Career Journey and also the chance to tap into the resources of our career frameworks to better know about your roles, skills, and opportunities.

EY is equally committed to being an inclusive employer, and we strive to achieve the right balance for our people—enabling us to deliver excellent client service while allowing our people to build their careers as well as focus on their wellbeing.

If you can confidently demonstrate that you meet the criteria above, please contact us as soon as possible.

Join us in shaping the future with confidence. Apply Now

title: Audit & Assurance - Commercial - Associate 2
description:
At PwC, our people in audit and assurance focus on providing independent and objective assessments of financial statements, internal controls, and other assurable information enhancing the credibility and reliability of this information with a variety of stakeholders. They evaluate compliance with regulations including assessing governance and risk management processes and related controls. In financial statement audit at PwC, you will focus on obtaining reasonable assurance about whether the financial statements as a whole are free from material misstatement, whether due to fraud or error, and to issue an auditor’s report that includes the auditor’s opinion.

Driven by curiosity, you are a reliable, contributing member of a team. In our fast-paced environment, you are expected to adapt to working with a variety of clients and team members, each presenting varying challenges and scope. Every experience is an opportunity to learn and grow. You are expected to take ownership and consistently deliver quality work that drives value for our clients and success as a team. As you navigate through the Firm, you build a brand for yourself, opening doors to more opportunities.

Examples Of The Skills, Knowledge, And Experiences You Need To Lead And Deliver Value At This Level Include But Are Not Limited To:


Apply a learning mindset and take ownership for your own development.
Appreciate diverse perspectives, needs, and feelings of others.
Adopt habits to sustain high performance and develop your potential.
Actively listen, ask questions to check understanding, and clearly express ideas.
Seek, reflect, act on, and give feedback.
Gather information from a range of sources to analyse facts and discern patterns.
Commit to understanding how the business works and building commercial awareness.
Learn and apply professional and technical standards (e.g. refer to specific PwC tax and audit guidance), uphold the Firm's code of conduct and independence requirements.


About PwC

At PwC, our purpose is to build trust in society and solve important problems. With offices in 156 countries and more than 295,000 people, we are among the leading professional services networks in the world. We help organizations and individuals create the value they are looking for, by delivering quality in Assurance, Tax and Advisory services. Our global strategy ‘The New Equation’ reflects how we solve important problems facing the world—today and tomorrow.

In India, we operate as PwC India and PwC Acceleration Centers. PwC Acceleration Centers (ACs), formerly Service Delivery Centers, include two entities in India – Acceleration Center Kolkata and Acceleration Center Bangalore. The Acceleration Centers in India are diverse, global talent hubs focused on delivering value to our clients – providing virtual client engagement support around the world and across all PwC’s services and capabilities.

A role in PwC will provide you opportunities to apply skills beyond the workplace to create ground-breaking solutions for clients and our communities. Find out more and tell us what matters to you by visiting us at www.pwc.com.

Experience & Level: Fresher - Associate 2

Location: All

PwC Office: AC Kolkata

Job Description

What does this role entail?

Who we are?

PwC’s Operate business delivers large operational and managed service solutions for clients to meet regulatory, risk and compliance challenges. With over 2000 staff deployed on large implementation and execution programmes, Operate brings together top talent with a distinctive mix of knowledge and skills. Our rapidly-growing Financial Crime team supports many of the firm’s leading clients, largely within the banking and financial services sector. We deliver both remediation and managed services, from client premises and our purpose-built delivery center in Belfast. We cover a broad range of financial crime-related work for clients, including compliance with anti-money laundering (AML) and Know Your Customer (KYC) requirements, completing Politically Exposed Persons (PEPs) and sanctions reviews and carrying out alert and transaction monitoring.

Key Responsibilities:

Core Assurance


You will play an integral role in PwC’s core assurance services provided to clients.
Understand the process workflow related to work requests from initiation through completion, understand how workflow is managed within the firm's workflow management tool, understand optimal and required way to document results of work performed
Participate in a wide range of projects and collaborate across multiple work streams or teams; consistently demonstrating creative thinking, individual initiative, and timely completion of assigned work Consistently demonstrate teamwork dynamics by working as a team member: understand personal and team roles; contribute to a positive working environment by building solid relationships with team members; and proactively seek guidance, clarification, and feedback

title: Audit & Assurance - Financial Services - Associate 2
description:
At PwC, our people in audit and assurance focus on providing independent and objective assessments of financial statements, internal controls, and other assurable information enhancing the credibility and reliability of this information with a variety of stakeholders. They evaluate compliance with regulations including assessing governance and risk management processes and related controls. In financial statement audit at PwC, you will focus on obtaining reasonable assurance about whether the financial statements as a whole are free from material misstatement, whether due to fraud or error, and to issue an auditor’s report that includes the auditor’s opinion.

Driven by curiosity, you are a reliable, contributing member of a team. In our fast-paced environment, you are expected to adapt to working with a variety of clients and team members, each presenting varying challenges and scope. Every experience is an opportunity to learn and grow. You are expected to take ownership and consistently deliver quality work that drives value for our clients and success as a team. As you navigate through the Firm, you build a brand for yourself, opening doors to more opportunities.

Examples Of The Skills, Knowledge, And Experiences You Need To Lead And Deliver Value At This Level Include But Are Not Limited To:


Apply a learning mindset and take ownership for your own development.
Appreciate diverse perspectives, needs, and feelings of others.
Adopt habits to sustain high performance and develop your potential.
Actively listen, ask questions to check understanding, and clearly express ideas.
Seek, reflect, act on, and give feedback.
Gather information from a range of sources to analyse facts and discern patterns.
Commit to understanding how the business works and building commercial awareness.
Learn and apply professional and technical standards (e.g. refer to specific PwC tax and audit guidance), uphold the Firm's code of conduct and independence requirements.


About PwC

At PwC, our purpose is to build trust in society and solve important problems. With offices in 156 countries and more than 295,000 people, we are among the leading professional services networks in the world. We help organizations and individuals create the value they are looking for, by delivering quality in Assurance, Tax and Advisory services. Our global strategy ‘The New Equation’ reflects how we solve important problems facing the world—today and tomorrow.

In India, we operate as PwC India and PwC Acceleration Centers. PwC Acceleration Centers (ACs), formerly Service Delivery Centers, include two entities in India – Acceleration Center Kolkata and Acceleration Center Bangalore. The Acceleration Centers in India are diverse, global talent hubs focused on delivering value to our clients – providing virtual client engagement support around the world and across all PwC’s services and capabilities.

A role in PwC will provide you opportunities to apply skills beyond the workplace to create ground-breaking solutions for clients and our communities. Find out more and tell us what matters to you by visiting us at www.pwc.com.

Experience & Level: Fresher - Associate 2

Location: All

PwC Office: AC Kolkata

Job Description

What does this role entail?

Who we are?

PwC’s Operate business delivers large operational and managed service solutions for clients to meet regulatory, risk and compliance challenges. With over 2000 staff deployed on large implementation and execution programmes, Operate brings together top talent with a distinctive mix of knowledge and skills. Our rapidly-growing Financial Crime team supports many of the firm’s leading clients, largely within the banking and financial services sector. We deliver both remediation and managed services, from client premises and our purpose-built delivery center in Belfast. We cover a broad range of financial crime-related work for clients, including compliance with anti-money laundering  (AML) and Know Your Customer (KYC) requirements, completing Politically Exposed Persons (PEPs) and sanctions reviews and carrying out alert and transaction monitoring.

Key Responsibilities:

Core Assurance


You will play an integral role in PwC’s core assurance services provided to clients.
Understand the process workflow related to work requests from initiation through completion, understand how workflow is managed within the firm's workflow management tool, understand optimal and required way to document results of work performed

title: PROJECT MANAGER L1
description:
Job description:

Job Description


Role 

The purpose of the role is to manage delivery of a project driving operations and delivery governance, ensuring right talent supply chain to optimize customer satisfaction and cost of delivery

͏

Do

- Delivery Management
- Ensure seamless delivery of the projects 
- Deploy optimum project delivery structure post transition/ migration phase by evaluating the budget, costs, risks and staffing requirement 
- Create quarterly project charter with well-defined weekly project trajectory as per the project specifications & requirements and ensure 100% adherence in terms of schedule, quality, efforts and costs 


- Ensure 100% compliance to Project SLAs, information security protocols and etc (all customers contractual obligations)
- Monitor and take appropriate actions on internal and external audit findings to ensure no major non-compliance/ deviation from the SLA
- Liaise between customer and internal technical delivery team to drive project health by adhering to organizational norms of project metrics
- Drive various project related audits like quality, customer, ISO etc and ensure zero non-compliance
- Conduct periodic cadence with the quality team to take proactive measures to resolves issues/ possible escalations
- Conducts periodic cadence with Workforce Management Group (WMG) to ensure 100% fulfillment as per the program/ project requirement
- Regularly audit quality (QA) status of delivery and engage QA team to ensure adherence to Quality Assurance standards and processes
- Maintain project structure in Confluence & SAP in line with prevailing business requirements and norms
- Ensure expected ramp down (ERD) compliance as committed in MSA

- Client Relationship Management
- Engage with client to deploy opportunities to deploy multiple solutions within/ across SLs to create a stronger value proposition for clients
- Conduct regular customer connects (meetings/ visits/ video- conference) and participate in Management Review Meetings (MRM) with client management/engagement managers to understand customers current and future needs and seek feedback to improve delivery methodology/ timelines/ resource allocation

- Identify and close early warnings on a project to avoid any customer escalations
- Plan and conduct Quarterly Business Reviews (QBR) along with DMs/ ADH with the client management/ leadership team to drive improvement actions and mine for a new portfolio/ opportunity within the account
- Design and monitor project performance dashboards/ reports with the clients periodically

- Delivery governance across the project
- Create weekly/ monthly/ quarterly MIS and reports to monitor and track overall project
- Conduct periodic reviews with the delivery team on operational, quality and fulfillment parameters and new idea generation & its implementation on existing projects

- Identify and resolve potential risks or early warning signs on project delivery to drive for ZERO surprise escalations and eliminate any revenue leakage
- Escalate any deviations from the project charter to the delivery managers in terms of schedule, effort, cost, infrastructure from the project charter and minimize process exceptions and such deviations from the actual project plan
- Review and monitor revenue allocations/ realization to avoid OB revenue leakage
- Provide inputs to delivery leadership team on overall delivery performance parameters (project heath, utilization, realization etc) at project/ program level during reviews highlighting any critical project escalations and potential risks

͏

- Operational Excellence
- Automation Focus
- Perform pareto analysis as per the no. of incidents received and accordingly identify automation opportunities and drive value adds across the project
- Deploy next generation hyper automation and crowdsourcing initiatives in coordination with Holmes RO team to enhance productivity, quality and speed of delivery


- Interact and engage with tools team to bring in new tools in the project to automate certain pointers/ elimination of any noise in the project

- Innovation Focus
- Brainstorm with the team to identify improvement opportunities and initiatives to further improve quality, delivery speed and productivity parameters
- Drive value adds and BVMs; ensure management showcases them to customer in MRM & QBR to drive growth

- Plan and conduct periodic idea campaigns to generate new solutions to the problems/ define better ways of working

- Drive and deploy Knowledge Management and sharing 
- Contribute in internal knowledge sharing initiatives at Wipro by driving internal training sessions, best practices, learnings, value adds and BVMs and deploys best practices in various projects within own account
- Deploy the Wipro's knowledge management portal across the account and monitor & track trainings

- Capability Development and Talent Pipeline Creation
- Demand forecasting in line with business requirements 
- Anticipate attrition and ensure right talent supply chain to deliver the project
- Spearhead quarterly demand forecasting and resource planning aligned to project requirements


- Create and deploy a workplan to fulfil the required demand from all the talent channels including external (lateral, contractors etc) hiring in coordination with WMG/ CWMG and Talent Acquisition team
- Anticipate new skills/ upcoming technologies required to deliver the project and ensure the team is trained or right talent is inducted into the project as per the skill requirements

- Drive 100% compliance on trainings and upskilling requirements 
- Prioritize and identify essential and upcoming technical skills required across programs/ projects to facilitate and drive right supply chain
- Drive towards 100% mandatory training compliance for the target population within an account

- Plan and drive rotations for seed positions and ensure replacement plan to be arrived ahead of rotations
- Quarterly connect with critical talent to understand their career aspirations and create their learning maps along with project managers and HRBP

- Fresher engagement program
- Ensure a stable arrangement and assimilation of rookie within accounts in coordination with competency group team (classroom trainings/ e-learning, certifications, on the job training etc)

- Team Management
- Resourcing
- Forecast talent requirements as per the current and future business needs
- Hire adequate and right resources for the team

- Talent Management
- Ensure adequate onboarding and training for the team members to enhance capability & effectiveness
- Build an internal talent pool and ensure their career progression within the organization


- Manage team attrition
- Drive diversity in leadership positions
- Performance Management
- Set goals for the team, conduct timely performance reviews and provide constructive feedback to own direct reports
- Ensure that the Performance Nxt is followed for the entire team

- Employee Satisfaction and Engagement
- Lead and drive engagement initiatives for the team
- Track team satisfaction scores and identify initiatives to build engagement within the team

- Facilitate rewards and recognition to acknowledge the high performers in the team
 

͏

Deliver

 
1.
 
Delivery Management ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢Â‚Â¬Ã¢Â€Âœ Client satisfaction
 
PCSAT, Brand score, no. of customer references, SDR/ QBR %, Pulse % satisfied (top 2 box), Zero surprise delivery escalation from the customer, adherence to project charter
 
2.
 
Delivery Management ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢Â‚Â¬Ã¢Â€Âœ operational efficiency
 
Contractual adherence %, Quality index, Utilization %, cost of delivery target, overdue indent, 100% SLA compliance, PEI % target, 100% usage of click to bill, % SAP loss for T&M projects
 
3.
 
Delivery Management ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢Â‚Â¬Ã¢Â€Âœ Financials
 
Revenue target achievement, Operating margin %, leakage from OB to revenue, revenue per employee, CR realization target, process exceptions to be minimized, bench cost % of total cost, underrun % target for FPP projects, effort saving through NG-1, NG-2 initiatives
 
5.
 
Capability Building
 
% attrition, critical talent attrition%, % trained on new age skills, % of team trained in necessary behavioural skills, diversity ratio, % localization targets by market, billable rookie ratio, rookie/NJNB assimilation TATs, offshore mix
 
6.
 
Team Management
 
Team attrition %, Employee satisfaction score
 

͏

Mandatory Skills: AI Consulting Product Management .

 

Experience: 8-10 Years
.

 

Reinvent your world. We are building a modern Wipro. We are an end-to-end digital transformation partner with the boldest ambitions. To realize them, we need people inspired by reinvention. Of yourself, your career, and your skills. We want to see the constant evolution of our business and our industry. It has always been in our DNA - as the world around us changes, so do we. Join a business powered by purpose and a place that empowers you to design your own reinvention.

Show more

title: HR Intern
description:
Instawork is on a mission to create meaningful economic opportunities for skilled hourly professionals in communities around the globe. Our AI-powered labor marketplace helps local businesses scale, and enables global technology companies to push the frontiers of robotics and AI. Backed by world-class investors like Benchmark, Spark Capital, Craft Ventures, Greylock, Y Combinator, and others, we’re looking for exceptional talent to reimagine the way the world works.

Location: Kormangala, Bangalore

Working Days: 6 Days a Week

Experience: Fresher (0–1 year)

Duration: 3 months

About the Role:

We are looking for a proactive and energetic HR Intern to support our day-to-day recruitment activities. This role is perfect for someone who wants to kick-start their career in HR, enjoys interacting with people, and thrives in a fast-paced startup environment.

Key Responsibilities:


Support end-to-end hiring for fresher and entry-level roles
Source, screen, and call candidates for various positions
Schedule and coordinate interviews with hiring panels
Maintain candidate trackers and ensure timely follow-ups
Assist in releasing offer letters and completing onboarding documentation
Ensure strong communication and coordination between candidates and internal stakeholders
Contribute to improving hiring processes and candidate experience



Requirements:


Good written and verbal communication skills
Strong organizational and follow-up abilities
Proactive attitude and willingness to learn
Comfortable working in a dynamic startup environment
Ability to manage multiple tasks at once
Available to work 6 days a week



Additional information:


Free Lunch + Snacks Daily
Cool workspace and fun team environment
Exclusive project goodies



Our Values


Empathy, Trust & Candor We put ourselves in the shoes of our colleagues and customers and don’t shy away from uncomfortable conversations, instead building trust through honest and direct feedback.
Bias for Action We practice high-velocity decision-making, clear-eyed that we often operate with incomplete information. Growing quickly means it’s OK to be wrong, so long as we learn from our mistakes and course correct!
Always Be Learning We’re a curious bunch, and with AI transforming our workplace we encourage everyone to learn from each other, compounding our knowledge and experience to help us change an entire industry.
Act Like an Owner We work long, hard, and smart, building products that delight our users and drive growth. Your ability to impact Instawork is limited only by your courage and conviction, not your job description.



About Instawork

Founded in 2015, Instawork is the nation’s leading online labor marketplace for food services, hospitality, light industry, and logistics, connecting more than 7M skilled workers with local restaurants, hotels, warehouses, stadiums, and more. Our AI-powered platform serves thousands of businesses across more than 50 major markets in the United States and Canada. We're not just helping fill shifts, we're supporting local economies—and we're just getting started!

Instawork has been featured by CBS News, The Wall Street Journal, The Washington Post, and the Associated Press. Forbes included us on their Next Billion Dollar Startups list; RetailTech Breakthrough named us Workforce Hiring Solution of the Year for 2025; and Inc. 5000 recognized us as one of the country's top 10% fastest-growing companies two years in a row. But what matters most is our impact. We're solving real problems for real people, and we’re doing it at scale.

Join our team to help us build something that matters! We’re looking for superstars who want to help us shape the future of work. With hubs in San Francisco, Bangalore, and Chicago, city offices in New York, Phoenix, and Singapore, we're back to working together in-person five days a week because we believe the best ideas happen when great people collaborate face-to-face. We also value diverse perspectives and encourage applications from candidates of all backgrounds.

Ready to make an impact? Learn more at www.instawork.com/about.

Personnel Privacy Policy
Show more

title: Artificial Intelligence Intern
description:
About the Company

ZeTheta Algorithms Private Limited (www.zetheta.com) is a FinTech start-up which has been recently set up and is developing innovative AI tools.

https://www.instagram.com/zetheta.official/




About the Role

We are seeking a talented and motivated student/ fresher intern to develop AI models from scratch within a 2 month timeframe. This is an extraordinary opportunity for a self-driven, technically skilled student to build a complete enterprise-grade system that incorporates cutting-edge AI technologies including deep learning.




Responsibilities

Design and implement the complete AI Models following provided specifications
Develop both frontend and backend components of the platform
Create and integrate AI modules
Design and optimize database schema and queries
Ensure system security, especially for sensitive identity verification data
Deploy the solution using zero-cost cloud services
Document code, APIs, and system architecture
Complete the entire project within the 2 month timeline




Qualifications

No experience required. Preferably, a student who is currently pursuing or fresh graduate who has recently completed a degree in Computer Science, AI/ML, or related field.




Required Skills (permitted to use all LLMs)

Strong programming skills in Python and JavaScript
Understanding of React.js for frontend development and Node.js for backend
Knowledge of FastAPI or similar Python web frameworks
Familiarity with database design and SQL (particularly PostgreSQL with Supabase)
Deployment on AWS with CD/ CI Pipelines and Manual Environment in EC2 instance, S3
Understanding of basic machine learning concepts
Self-motivated with ability to work independently




Preferred Skills (permitted to use all LLMs)

Sound knowledge of AI/ML libraries (TensorFlow, Keras, HuggingFace Transformers)
Familiarity with computer vision techniques using OpenCV
Knowledge of natural language processing concepts
Sound knowledge of facial recognition or emotion detection systems
Understanding of identity verification methodologies
Docker containerization experience
Prior work with cloud deployment (AWS)




Who Should Apply?

Student or fresh graduate from any academic discipline.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
Basic knowledge of Microsoft Office.
Willingness to self-learn and work in a fast-paced environment.




Internship Details

Duration: Self paced, options for 15days or 1,2,3,4 or 6 months.
Type: Unpaid

title: Business Management Graduate
description:
About Us

At blankLab, we believe in fostering a dynamic work environment where every team member has the opportunity to thrive and contribute to meaningful projects. As a leading player in the marketing industry, we are committed to excellence and continuous improvement. Join us on our journey of innovation and success.




Position Overview

We are seeking a passionate and ambitious Business Management Graduate to join our team in Mumbai, India. This role offers an excellent opportunity for professional growth and development within our organisation. The successful candidate will gain hands-on experience across various aspects of business management, collaborate with experienced professionals, and contribute to achieving blankLab’s strategic goals.




Responsibilities

Analyse market trends and competitor activity to identify business opportunities
Support the development and execution of strategic business plans
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to implement key projects and initiatives
Conduct research and prepare reports on key business metrics and performance indicators
Participate in meetings and brainstorming sessions to drive continuous improvement
Assist with administrative tasks and provide general support to the management team




Qualifications

Bachelor’s degree in Business Management or a related field
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
Excellent communication and interpersonal abilities
Self-motivated, proactive, and eager to learn
Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a fast-paced environment




Benefits

Competitive salary based on experience
Opportunities for career advancement and skill development
Comprehensive training programmes and mentorship from industry professionals
Health insurance and employee benefits package
Supportive, vibrant, and inclusive work culture




Ready to launch your career with blankLab?

Apply now and take the first step towards a rewarding future in business management.

title: Intern Business Analyst
description:
We’re looking for a curious and analytical Intern Business Analyst who is passionate about solving business problems through research, structured analysis, and strategic thinking. In this role, you will support the team in identifying business challenges, researching solutions, and contributing to the organization’s research & development initiatives.

📍 Location: Remote

🧠 Experience: Fresher or previous Internship experience in Business Analysis or similar role

📈 Salary: 5K to 10K per month

🌟 Our Values

User First Approach

Understanding business problems from the user's perspective.

Honest & Constructive Communication

Clear and transparent collaboration with team members.

Constant Improvement

Encouraging experimentation and learning from data and insights.

Planning & Long-Term Thinking

Building sustainable business solutions through research and strategy.

🎯 Core Responsibilities
Conduct research and analysis to understand business problems and market trends
Identify potential solutions and improvement opportunities for business challenges
Support the team with data analysis, documentation, and reporting
Coordinate with internal teams to gather insights and validate research findings
Assist in R&D initiatives for new product or business strategies
Participate in discussions and consultations to propose actionable insights
Contribute to solving business problems through structured analytical thinking
📊 Monthly Goal
Assist in research and analysis leading to resolution of key business problems
Provide structured research reports and solution recommendations
👤 Ideal Candidate
Strong analytical and problem-solving mindset
Ability to research, interpret data, and identify insights
Good communication and coordination skills
Ability to break complex business problems into structured analysis
Comfortable working in a remote and collaborative environment
🛠 Tools & Platforms
Google Sheets / Excel
Notion / Documentation tools
Communication tools such as Slack / MS Teams
Research and analytics tools
🎓 Qualifications
Degree in Business Administration, Management, Economics, Data Analytics, or related field
Prior 1 year experience in Business Analysis or research-related work
Internship, freelance, or academic research experience is a plus
⏰ Availability

Part-time initially (20 hours/week)

Later extended to 40 hours/week

Team Meeting: 10:30 AM IST – NAB Team Meeting

title: Voter data entry, Work from home job.
description:
We are seeking freshers and experienced candidates for voter data entry, Work from home job.

Salary:- 28,000/- to 30,000/- Monthly (Depends upon quantity and accuracy of work)

Workweek:- Monday – Saturday (Sunday holiday)

Bankura, Purulia, Purba Medinipur, Paschim Medinipur, Asansol, Kulti, Andal, Durgapur, Bardhaman, Birbhum, Hooghly, Malda, Murshidabad, Nadia, Dhanbad and more…

Proficiency in English reading and typing.
Candidate should have laptop or desktop to perform this work.
Attention to detail for accurate data input.


Fresher and experienced, applicants are eligible for this position.

Job Resource Point, Module No.:- 408,

Webel I.T Park near Anandabazar Patrika Factory,

Barjora, Bankura, West Bengal

title: Sales And Marketing Intern | Madhapur, Hyderabad | Fresher
description:
Quick Details

Job Title: Digital Sales Intern
Company: Lagran
Location: Office
Duration: 6 Months
Type: Internship (Performance‑based opportunity)
Skill Set: Very good Communication & negotiation skills




Company Description

Lagran Software Solutions brings expertise in software development and digital marketing, earned through collaborations with over 10 clients. We are a forward-thinking company committed to empowering businesses with high-fidelity technological solutions. Our mission is to go the extra mile to help brands achieve their goals and demonstrate measurable impact. With Lagran Software Solutions, businesses can transform their ideas into scalable realities.




Role Description

This is a full-time, on-site role for a Sales and Marketing Intern based in Madhapur, Hyderabad. The intern will support the sales and marketing teams by assisting with client engagement, executing sales strategies, conducting market research, providing excellent customer service, and participating in team training programs. They will also collaborate closely with team members to manage daily sales activities and develop their understanding of sales processes and strategies.




Qualifications

Strong Communication and Customer Service skills, including a focus on client engagement and building relationships
Basic Sales knowledge and a willingness to learn Sales Management principles
Ability to participate in and benefit from team Training programs
Motivation to succeed in a fast-paced sales and marketing environment
Organizational skills and the ability to multitask effectively
Bachelor’s degree or ongoing education in Business, Marketing, or a related field is a plus
Previous internship experience in sales or marketing is an advantage but not required

title: Student
description:
Company Description

Digital Marketing is a platform dedicated to providing the latest updates, expert tips, and behind-the-scenes insights into the world of marketing. It is a hub for engaging with industry trends, sharing ideas, and connecting with fellow marketing enthusiasts. Our mission is to help brands and individuals promote their pages and businesses effectively, catering to all marketing needs. Join our community to grow and learn in the ever-evolving digital space.




Role Description

This part-time Student role involves assisting with daily marketing tasks, creating and managing content for various digital platforms, and interacting with team members to execute brand promotion strategies. The position is on-site and based in Anantnag. The role is ideal for individuals seeking hands-on experience in digital marketing while pursuing their studies.

title: Marketing Intern
description:
Job Title: Marketing Executive (MBA – Marketing Fresher)

Location: Mohali (On-site)

Experience: Freshers

Shift: 2 pm to 11 pm




Job Overview:

We are looking for an enthusiastic and driven MBA (Marketing) fresher to join our marketing team. This role is ideal for candidates who have a basic understanding of marketing concepts and are familiar with tools like Salesforce CRM and HubSpot. You will support marketing campaigns, lead management, and customer engagement activities while gaining hands-on experience in a dynamic environment.




Key Responsibilities:

Assist in planning and executing marketing campaigns
Work on lead generation and lead nurturing activities
Manage and update data in CRM tools like Salesforce and HubSpot
Support email marketing, social media, and digital campaigns
Analyze campaign performance and prepare reports
Coordinate with sales and business teams for lead follow-ups
Assist in content creation, presentations, and marketing materials




Required Skills:

MBA in Marketing (Freshers can apply)
Basic understanding of marketing principles and digital marketing
Familiarity with Salesforce CRM and HubSpot
Good communication and interpersonal skills
Basic knowledge of MS Excel and PowerPoint
Analytical mindset and attention to detail




Preferred Attributes:

Quick learner with a proactive attitude
Ability to work in a team environment
Strong organizational and coordination skills




What We Offer:

Hands-on experience in marketing tools and campaigns
Learning and growth opportunities
Exposure to real-time projects and industry practices

title: Human Resources Intern
description:
Job Title: HR Intern

Company: 1XL

Job Type: Full-time

Stipend: 15,000 for 3 month, one time payment post Internship

Experience: Fresher

Job Mode: Work From Office

Location: Ahmedabad




About Us

1XL is a Dubai-based, dynamic, and versatile company that encompasses various aspects of personal and professional growth. With a commitment to empowering individuals and organizations, 1XL aims to inspire, educate, and equip people with the tools they need to succeed in various domains of life.




Role Overview

We are looking for a proactive and enthusiastic HR Intern to support our Human Resources team in daily operations. This role offers hands-on experience in recruitment, employee engagement, and HR processes. The ideal candidate will be eager to learn, highly organized, and passionate about building a career in Human Resources.

Key Responsibilities

1. Recruitment & Hiring Support

Assist in sourcing candidates through job portals and social media
Screen resumes and shortlist candidates
Coordinate interview schedules and follow-ups
Maintain candidate database and recruitment trackers

2. Employee Engagement

Support in organizing employee engagement activities
Assist in internal communication initiatives
Help in maintaining a positive workplace culture

3. HR Operations

Maintain employee records and documentation
Assist in onboarding and offboarding processes
Support in preparing HR reports and trackers

4. Administrative Support

Handle day-to-day HR administrative tasks
Maintain files, records, and HR databases
Assist the HR team in daily operations
Requirements
Bachelor’s degree in HR, Business Administration, or related field (or pursuing)
Strong communication and interpersonal skills
Basic knowledge of HR functions
Good organizational and multitasking abilities
Proficiency in MS Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint)
What You Will Gain
Hands-on experience in core HR functions
Exposure to recruitment and HR operations
Opportunity to work in a dynamic and growing organization
Skill development in communication and people management
Note

This is a 3-month internship with a one-time stipend payout upon successful completion of the internship.

title: Sales and Marketing Management Trainee
description:
Company Description

Captiv is a cutting-edge digital transformation platform engineered for revenue creation, partnering with enterprises, governments, and global institutions to redefine revenue generation and scaling through technology. Operating as a multi-engine growth platform, Captiv encompasses diverse verticals such as Cloud Infrastructure, Fintech, Government Systems, AI Automation, and Enterprise Transformation. By emphasizing ownership, speed, and efficiency, Captiv delivers predictable revenue systems, enhanced deal velocity, and scalable global expansion models. With a vision of reaching USD 120 million by 2029, Captiv is focused on building high-impact, revenue-driven digital systems to drive transformative growth for its partners.




Role Description

This is a part-time hybrid role for a Sales and Marketing Management Trainee based in Chennai, with flexibility to work from home for certain tasks. The role involves supporting the design and implementation of sales and marketing strategies, conducting market research, building relationships with clients, and assisting in the development of training programs for sales personnel. The Trainee will also work closely with the Sales and Marketing teams to expand market opportunities and ensure seamless customer service delivery.




🚀 We’re Hiring: Management Trainee – Marketing

📍 Location: Sholinganallur - Chennai

🎓 Experience: Fresher / 0–1 Year

Are you creative, enthusiastic, and eager to kickstart your career in marketing? We’re looking for a Management Trainee – Marketing to join our team and support exciting campaigns while building strong brand presence.

🔍 Key Responsibilities:
Assist in planning & executing marketing campaigns
Create engaging creatives using Canva
Manage and support social media activities
Conduct market research & competitor analysis
Prepare presentations and marketing materials
Track campaign performance and generate reports
🛠 Skills Required:
Basic knowledge of Digital Marketing
Hands-on experience with Canva / design tools
Familiarity with social media platforms
Good communication & presentation skills
Basic knowledge of MS Excel & PowerPoint
⭐ Good to Have:
Knowledge of Photoshop / Illustrator
Understanding of SEO, Google Ads, or Email Marketing
Content writing skills

🎯 What You’ll Gain:

Real-time marketing exposure
Hands-on campaign experience
Learning opportunities in branding & digital strategy

📩 Interested candidates can apply by sending their resume to: hr@captivtech.com

#Hiring #MarketingJobs #FresherJobs #DigitalMarketing #Canva #JobOpening #Careers.

title: Sales And Marketing Intern
description:
Akaththi Farms – Sales & Marketing Intern (Market Development Role)

If you’re a fresher who wants to understand how the real market works — not just sit and observe — this role is for you.




At Akaththi Farms, we are building Chennai’s premium exotic mushroom market from scratch.




We’re looking for curious individuals who want to learn by doing and grow with us.




No prior experience needed.

Curiosity and execution matter more.




Who This Role Is For

Freshers (Graduated)
Curious individuals interested in sales, marketing, and entrepreneurship
People who enjoy talking to customers and working on the field
Those who want to build real-world experience from day one




Role Overview

This is a fully on-ground, execution-driven role focused on:

Market development
Sales execution
Customer interaction

You will work directly in Chennai markets — stores, customers, and partners.




What You’ll Work On

Market Development

Visit stores, cafés, and restaurants across Chennai
Support onboarding of new partners
Identify growth opportunities across different zones

Sales Execution

Track product movement in stores
Ensure strong visibility and placement
Support restocking and order coordination
Drive repeat orders and consistency

Customer Interaction

Engage with customers at store level
Understand buying behaviour and objections
Educate customers on product usage

Marketing Support

Assist in on-ground promotions and sampling
Capture real-time content (store visits, customer interactions)
Support WhatsApp communication and outreach




What We Expect

Strong curiosity and willingness to learn
Comfort interacting with people
Ability to take initiative and execute independently
Basic communication skills (Tamil required, English optional)




Additional Requirement

🛵 Two-wheeler preferred (not mandatory)
You should be comfortable with regular travel across Chennai for store visits and market activities.




Internship Details

📍 Location: Chennai (Onsite)

🗓 Work Days: Tuesday – Saturday

❌ Sunday & Monday Off

⏰ Timing: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM

⏳ Duration: 3 Months (Onsite Internship)

💰 Stipend: ₹8,000 per month




Growth Opportunity

This is a performance-driven role.




Based on your performance and contribution to market development:

Internship may be extended, OR
You may receive a full-time opportunity (PPO)




High performers will become part of the core team scaling Akaththi Farms.




Final Note

This role is for people who want to learn by being in the market.




You’ll understand:

What makes customers buy
How stores operate
How demand is built




If you’re curious enough to explore and bold enough to execute,




Come build something Chennai will remember.

Show more
